overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy character walking along a winding dirt trail through scenic prairie and rocky terrain. The character encounters a mounted rider and two horse-drawn carriages while traversing the wilderness with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with mountain backdrop

events.description: lone horse rider gallops across the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through open grassland toward distant mountains

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback crossing the trail from right to left at a gallop

entered.detail: worn dirt path with visible wheel ruts cutting through the grassland
tall mountain range with snow-covered peaks dominating the horizon
tall evergreen pine tree standing on the left side of the trail
tall green grass and wildflowers flanking both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie trail with the character walking toward distant snow-capped mountains. Tall pine trees dot the landscape while a horse rider suddenly gallops across the path from right to left. The terrain is open and sunlit with natural grassland stretching to the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliffside trail with mountain views

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the trail moving from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as it runs alongside a large rocky cliff formation on the left

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver traveling along the trail and passing the player

entered.detail: large rock formation and cliff face lining the left side of the trail creating a partial enclosure

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a semi-enclosed section with a prominent rocky cliff face on the left. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the trail, moving alongside the player. The snow-capped mountains shift to the right side of the frame as the path curves through the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: valley trail with panoramic mountain vistas

events.description: second horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left on the trail

agents.ego_description: walking through an open valley with expansive views of the surrounding mountain ranges

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling along the trail and passing the player character

entered.detail: wide valley opening with rolling hills and distant forest visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wide valley with panoramic views of the surrounding wilderness. A second horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right. The rocky cliff recedes behind as the landscape opens up to reveal distant forests and mountain ranges under a clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding prairie trail that transitions from an open grassland into a narrow rocky pass before expanding into a panoramic valley. It begins with the character walking toward distant snow-capped mountains under a bright sun, just as a horse rider gallops across the path. As the trail curves, the environment shifts into a semi-enclosed section where a prominent rocky cliff face looms on the left and a horse-drawn carriage passes by. The scene then opens up as the cliff recedes, shifting the mountains to the right and revealing a wide valley where a second carriage travels along the road. Finally, the landscape expands fully to showcase distant forests and mountain ranges stretching beneath a clear blue sky.
